name: korean-ux-copy-marketplace

plugins.name: korean-ux-copy
plugins.description: Audit and improve user-facing Korean UX copy in codebases. Detects 15 anti-patterns (KA-100–KA-152) with 73% detection rate on GPT-generated Korean SaaS copy. Produces one Kanana-powered, conversion-safe rewrite per finding.
